Simple, connected spend & travel management
AI-powered expense, travel, and invoice solutions that unify your data, simplify work, and drive your business forward.
See a demo
Request pricing
July 29 | 10 AM PT / 1 PM ET
AI That Delivers: Real Financial Outcomes with SAP Concur
AI is only as powerful as the results it delivers, especially for leaders who need measurable impact. Join this webinar to see how SAP Concur is turning AI into real financial outcomes. Discover how your team can work more efficiently, minimize risk, and make faster, more informed decisions, without compromising governance or control.
Save your seat
Concur Expense
Expenses anywhere, anytime
Auto-capture receipts and generate reports
Apply and update spending policies instantly
Connect effortlessly to your financial systems
Make smarter decisions with data-driven insights
Learn about Concur Expense
Take a tour
Concur Travel
Business travel as it should be
Agentic AI assistant trained on your policies
Unmatched supplier content & booking options
Flexible integrations and the freedom to work with any TMC or GDS
User-friendly booking experience, offering the most convenient, safe and sustainable travel options
Learn about Concur Travel
Begin your tour
Concur Invoice
Accounts payable made easy
Automated, connected accounts payable
Prevent duplicate or incorrect payments
Simplify reporting and audits with real-time visibility into cash flow
Unify travel, expense, and AP into one holistic view
Learn about Concur Invoice
Start your tour
Integrations
Our tools work with your tools, right from the start
Choose from 300+ pre-built connectors and custom integrations that allow our solutions to work with your existing systems. If you need a custom integration—no problem—our open APIs make that possible for developers.
Learn more about integrations
Watch a short demo from our solution experts
Concur Expense
Watch Expense demo
Concur Travel
Watch Travel demo
Concur Invoice
Watch Invoice demo
Industry leaders in AI-powered T&E tools
Not only are we #1 on G2, but we are also the only T&E company to be named an AI leader across enterprise, midmarket, small business, and travel-booking applications.
IDC MarketScape T&E Software 2025
Trusted by users from companies of all sizes
< 500 Employees
“The automation not only saves time for employees and finance teams but also provides a clear overview of expenses, making reporting and follow-up significantly more efficient.”
Read the full review
500+ Employees
“This is a powerful tool for automating expense, travel, and invoice management. Its ability to integrate with other systems, such as ERPs, leads to significant time savings.”
Read the full review
10,000+ Employees
“What I like best about SAP Concur is how it simplifies and streamlines expense and travel management. It saves time, reduces errors, and provides clear visibility into spending, making processes more efficient for both employees and finance teams.”
Read the full review
FAQs about SAP Concur
What is SAP Concur?
SAP Concur is a cloud-based platform that helps you manage expense, travel, and invoice processes in one place. Our solutions automate how employees submit expenses, book travel, and handle invoices, while giving companies better visibility and control over their spending.
More about Concur
Is SAP Concur suitable for different business sizes?
Yes. SAP Concur solutions are designed for businesses of all sizes. Our flexible, centralized platform is built to grow with you, allowing you to scale your spend management along with your business.
Learn about scalability
How does SAP Concur help control spend?
SAP Concur helps control spend by giving you real-time visibility into where your money’s going and adding guardrails along the way. It automates processes, enforces policies, and flags unusual or out-of-policy expenses so you can make smarter spending decisions.
Learn about cost control
Does SAP Concur integrate with other solutions?
Yes. SAP Concur integrates with your existing HR, payroll, finance, CRM and more so you can manage everything in one place. We make it easy by offering pre-built connectors and integrations, or you can customize integrations for your specific business needs.
Learn about integrations
Does SAP Concur use AI?
Yes. SAP Concur has had AI and machine learning embedded in our solutions for over a decade. It works behind the scenes to automate tasks, capture receipt data, flag unusual or out-of-policy expenses, and spot potential fraud by analyzing spending patterns.
Learn about Concur and AI
There’s never been a better time for the best spend management
Contact sales
To learn more about SAP Concur and hear from a representative, please complete the form.
How can we help you?

Connections are no longer filtered by newly released apps
Skip to Enterprise Applications
Popular User Connections
Do more with your favorite apps and services by linking them to your SAP Concur account
Lufthansa German Airlines
A new level for your Travel & Expense management
Connect your Lufthansa Miles & More account with Concur to optimize your travel expenses automatically – it’s easy when you book all your business trips & extra services at LH.com.
American Airlines
Connect your AAdvantage Account with Concur
With SAP Concur + American, access your company’s negotiated rates on AA.com and sync AA.com bookings with Concur Travel and Expense.
SAP Concur mobile app
One app for travel, receipts, reports
Easily manage your travel and expenses with SAP Concur direct from your smartphone.
TripIt
An easier trip, every time
Connect to TripIt, the world’s highest-rated travel-organizing app, to access every trip in one place. Plus, TripIt Pro helps you stay one step ahead, from planning to landing.
Delta Air Lines
Make your business travel quick and easy with Delta.
Connect your Delta SkyMiles® account to access your company’s negotiated travel rates, view upcoming trips and sync your expenses all in one convenient place.
United Airlines
United makes corporate travel easier
Connect your United MileagePlus® profile to Concur and your United reservation details will automatically sync to your Concur account.
Hertz
Faster Connections, Better Reservations
Skip the counter and get on the road faster. Connect your Hertz profile with Concur, and your Hertz.com reservations will automatically sync.
Hyatt Hotels Corporation
Sync reservation details with Concur for business travel.
Make your travel more rewarding. Connect your World of Hyatt account with Concur and have access to everything in one place.
Uber
Tap. Ride. Expense.
Traveling for business has never been easier. Connect your Uber account to SAP Concur and your business trip receipts will automatically be sent to Concur Expense.
SIXT
Enjoy a great digital Sixtperience with SAP Concur & Sixt!
Connect your Sixt corporate booking profile with your SAP Concur profile and let your Sixt App and Sixt Web reservation and invoice data automatically sync into SAP Concur.
Skip to User Connections
Enterprise Applications
Pre-built business solutions integrated with your company's SAP Concur products
This is an SAP Concur endorsed app that has achieved premium certification.
Endorsed App
Motus Reimbursement
The complete solution for employee driving
Motus is the complete solution for employee driving. Integrated with Concur Expense, Motus optimizes field productivity & vehicle spend while reducing corporate liability exposure.
This is an SAP Concur endorsed app that has achieved premium certification.
Endorsed App
MedPro Connect Expense & Invoice
Access the 26 million MedProID HCP database via Concur Expense & Concur Invoice
MedPro Systems’ connector allows real-time access to the MedProID database via Concur Expense & Concur Invoice to simplify accurate HCP data capture for Aggregate Spend reporting.
This is an SAP Concur endorsed app that has achieved premium certification.
Endorsed App
International SOS
Worldwide Reach. Human Touch.
Streamline your organization’s travel, compliance, and Duty of Care with International SOS and Concur Travel.
This is an SAP Concur endorsed app that has achieved premium certification.
Endorsed App
Blue dot Tax Assurance
VAT Recovery made easy
Blue dot Tax Assurance handles domestic and foreign travel expenses, foreign VAT in AP,and centrally billed TMC and procurement card expenses, within a single platform.
This is an SAP Concur endorsed app that has achieved premium certification.
Endorsed App
Blue dot Benefits Assurance
Automatically detect fringe benefits in employee expenses
The Blue dot Benefits solution continuously analyses employee expense reports and receipt images to automatically identify items that must be reported as fringe or taxable benefits
Uber for Business
Now Part of the Perfect Trip
Uber for Business gives your organization more control and deeper insights while enabling employees to take rides on business profiles and expense seamlessly.
Amazon Business Integration
Simplify expensing Amazon Business purchases.
Connect your Amazon Business account to Concur Expense and your business purchases will be automatically imported into your expense reports, making it easy to get reimbursed.
Zylo Concur Expense Integration
Find your SaaS spend and bring Shadow IT out of the dark
How many SaaS apps do you think you have? Now multiply that by 3. The average company has more than 300 apps, but most leaders underestimate their SaaS by 2-3X.
EY Mobility Pathway – Travel
Fast guidance on tax and immigration issues arising from business travel
When employees travel, they can expose themselves and their company to risks involving corporate tax, immigration, social security, regulatory compliance and more.
Lyft Business
Give your travelers easy, reliable rides
With Lyft Business, you can provide reliable transportation that helps your business travelers focus on doing their best work — not searching for receipts.
Deloitte – Travel Ready
Pre-travel risk assessment to enable employees to work compliantly and with confidence
Connecting Deloitte with Concur Travel and Concur Request for real time assessment of travel and remote work compliance risk. Seamless user experience, empowering your business.
Tripkicks for Concur Travel
Making business travel better
Provides actionable insights for trips, guidance on appropriate spend and behavior, and enhances traveler experience.
Deloitte Travel Compliance
An employer compliance management tool for tax, payroll & other obligations
Maximizing the value of your Concur Travel & Expense data, connecting to Deloitte’s compliance platform to manage your businesses compliance and reporting needs.
Topia
Leverage SAP Concur Data for Business Travel and Distributed Work Compliance with Topia
Use Topia Compass to reduce travel booking costs, mitigate compliance risk and perform real-time pre-travel assessments.
AxosMoney
CFDI Compliance for Concur Expense
Complying with Mexican government CFDI regulations has never been easier. Simply use your mobile device to effortlessly validate your e-receipts integrated with Concur Expense.
Wipfli ExpenseConnect
Fully integrated with Microsoft D365 Business Central, F&O, SL, Oracle NetSuite & Sage Intacct.
Automated cloud-based connector with flexible data mapping between systems. Fully integrated with the supported ERP’s. No more manual manipulation of data files required!
Thrust Carbon for Concur Travel
Deep Decarbonization and Carbon Compliance for Business Travel
Operate more sustainability with award winning carbon intelligence software. Effortlessly report, reduce, and remove carbon, with directly connected data.
GATE4 Insights by Advito
Track and reduce your travel program’s carbon emissions with accurate sustainability reporting
Integrate your SAP Concur data into GATE4 Insights by Advito to get accurate travel emissions reporting with the industry’s only ISO-certified calculation methodology.
Thrust Carbon for Concur Expense
Deep Decarbonization and Carbon Compliance for Business Travel
Operate more sustainability with award winning carbon intelligence software. Effortlessly report, reduce, and remove carbon, with directly connected data.
SAP E-Mobility
Drive the transition to sustainable and convenient electric mobility.
Simplify reimbursement of employee electricity costs from charging company cars at home
PivotPrime Expense
Report on expenses allocated to clients, projects, and intercompany.
Creates statements of expenses allocated to clients, projects, and intercompany – pulling all approved expenses from Concur along with receipt images – to include in a statement.
PivotPrime Invoice
Creates statements of purchases allocated to clients, projects, and intercompany.
Statements of purchases allocated to clients, projects, and intercompany – pulling all approved transactions from Concur with payment request images – to include in statements.
Concur Detect by Oversight
Enhance your expense audit program while mitigating and reducing risk
Concur Detect by Oversight analyzes expenses pre- and post-payment to identify errors, waste, patterns of misuse, and fraud.
Booking.com for Business
The biggest online accommodation marketplace in the world
With close to 2 million accommodation options in 220+ countries, Booking.com for Business offers more bookable properties than any other marketplace through Concur Travel
Total Trip Insights by Advito
See your full travel picture with automated expense data consolidation.
Optimize your travel program with Total Trip Insights by Advito. Combine Concur Expense data with agency, supplier, and other sources to elevate your strategy and drive results.
Axosnet Digital Invoice Verifier
Web-based CFDI Compliance for Concur Expense and Concur Invoice
Validate e-invoices (CFDI) without hassle within Concur Expense and Concur Invoice, verifying structure, signature and certificates to comply with Mexican government regulations.
Expense Connector for Sage
Automatically post expenses into Sage
Seamless integration between Concur Expense and Sage50 (UK), Sage200 (UK), Sage300 & SageX3
OmniFY Expense Dynamics NAV&BC
Clean integration between Concur Expense and Microsoft Dynamics Navision and Business Central
Built on Dynamics NAV technology, the middleware-free connector can be configured and managed by your staff to meet your business requirements without costly custom development.
This is an SAP Concur endorsed app that has achieved premium certification.
Endorsed App
MedPro Export Aggregate Spend
Automate data export from SAP Concur to any Aggregate Spend Solution
Simplify end-to-end transparency data management with MedPro’s automated export connector for SAP Concur to our leading Aggregate Spend Application, MedPro ComplianceReportingID
This is an SAP Concur endorsed app that has achieved premium certification.
Endorsed App
MedPro Connect International
The Life Sciences industry’s HCP app for Aggregate Spend with international data
The Life Sciences industry’s HCP app for Aggregate Spend with international data.
Veeva Network Connector
Access HCP data from Concur Expense
Improve compliance and accuracy with access to Veeva Network’s global database of complete, up-to-date Health Care Provider records.
Productiv for Concur Invoice
Track SaaS spend through supplier payments in the Productiv SaaS Intelligence™ platform
Track SaaS app spend by supplier and identify spend optimization opportunities in the Productiv SaaS Intelligence™ platform with the Productiv Connector for Concur Invoice.
Veeva Connector
Accurate streamlined reporting
Enable users to capture expenses in Veeva and post them to Concur Expense automatically, eliminating duplicate work and improving spend accuracy.
Wipfli InvoiceConnect
Fully integrated  with Microsoft D365 Business Central, F&O, SL, Oracle NetSuite & Sage Intacct.
Automated cloud-based connector with flexible data mapping between systems. Fully integrated with the supported ERP’s. No more manual manipulation of data files required!
IQVIA Global OneKey Connector
Real-time access to a database of global healthcare professionals within SAP Concur
Enable your global organization to select the right physician, nurse, or administrator profile in real time to satisfy global transparency regulations.
Groupize
The easiest way to manage groups, meetings, and events.
Groupize integrates with Concur Travel to revolutionize travel, meetings, and events for your entire organization.
Cvent Concur Expense Connector
Integrating Travel, Meetings & Expense
Cvent and Concur Expense automate the attendee process and backend reconciliation of meetings, travel and expense data.
Healix Sentinel Tracker
Quickly locate and communicate with your global workforce to ensure their safety.
Healix Sentinel Tracker, integrated with Concur Travel, provides a real-time global view of employees on an interactive map and facilitates 2-way communication to ensure their safety.
Terra Dotta AlertTraveler
Locate & notify global travelers with real-time event intelligence and two-way in-app communication
AlertTraveler provides a command center for locating, communicating with, and accounting for travelers, automatically updating itinerary info from Concur Travel and/or TripLink.
OnSolve
Identify risks and communicate in real-time, all from one easy-to-use platform
OnSolve helps organizations remain agile when a crisis strikes using AI-powered technology to pinpoint and respond to threats that impact people, places, and property.
battleface Travel Protection
battleface offers travel protection for business and bleisure trips or corporate group travel.
battleface offers travel protection plans for individuals traveling for business, bleisure, and corporate groups attending meetings, tradeshows, or conferences.
Time Tracker by eBillity
Finally track time and expenses together!
Connect SAP Concur with Time Tracker and your team can easily track time and expenses together for fast and accurate billing.
CIBTvisas
Fast and easy global travel visa services
CIBTvisas’ service helps to simplify complex foreign entry requirements, increase traveler compliance, and fulfill duty of care obligations in accordance with international travel.

praised: The automation not only saves time for employees and finance teams but also provides a clear overview of expenses
powerful tool for automating expense, travel, and invoice management. Its ability to integrate with other systems, such as ERPs, leads to significant time savings
simplifies and streamlines expense and travel management. It saves time, reduces errors, and provides clear visibility into spending
complaints: Repeatedly featured as 'Software horror show: SAP Concur' on Hacker News (356 upvotes, 190 comments and another 198/181 thread) — widely criticized UX and clunky workflows
Hipmunk co-founders 'spurned' by SAP Concur when attempting to buy back the company — signals acquired-and-neglected product criticism

pricing.notes: Pricing page returns 404; SAP Concur uses contact-sales/request-a-quote model. Multiple service tiers exist (Concur Essential Care, Select Care, Advanced Care) but prices are not published.
